truthAudit.Summary: Run 2 correctly identified 4 critical/high vulnerabilities (SC-V3-005, SC-V3-007, SC-V3-009, SC-V3-010) and partially identified SC-V3-014. It missed 15 true vulnerabilities including critical Format-String Injection, Use-After-Free, and Integer Underflow. Run 2 Finding 1 (Command Injection) targeted the Admin Interface rather than the Config Validation instance specified in SC-V3-004, resulting in a miss for that specific ID despite finding a similar flaw.

Items.Notes: Run 2 did not identify Format-String Injection in log_format or printf usage.
Run 2 did not identify Integer Overflow in factorial computation (result *= i).
Run 2 did not identify Use-After-Free in memory-pool cleanup or stage_deferred_history_flush.
Run 2 found Command Injection in Admin Interface (line 609), but missed Config Validation Command Injection (line 567, validator_cmd).
Run 2 Finding 2 accurately identified Stack Buffer Overflow in evaluate_expression with correct evidence.
Run 2 did not identify Race Condition in Thread-Pool Counter (volatile long long).
Run 2 Finding 3 accurately identified Logic Bomb in Authentication with correct evidence.
Run 2 did not identify Path Traversal in Configuration Loading (config_dir_ + filename).
Run 2 Finding 5 accurately identified Heap Overflow in ExpressionParser with correct evidence.
Run 2 Finding 4 accurately identified Hardcoded Administrator Credentials with correct evidence.
Run 2 did not identify Weak PRNG for Session Tokens (std::mt19937).
Run 2 did not identify Thread-Unsafe Timestamp Cache in Logging (static std::tm cached_time).
Run 2 did not identify Insecure Temporary File Handling (supercalc_emergency.log).
Run 2 Finding 3 touched authentication state variables but focused on bypass logic rather than persistence state risk specifically.
Run 2 did not identify Unhandled Exception in Variable Parsing (std::stod(tokens[3])).
Run 2 did not identify Integer Underflow in Memory-Pool Block Split (previous_size - size - SPLIT_METADATA_BYTES).
Run 2 did not identify Unbounded Recursion in Parser (parse_expression; parse_factor).
Run 2 did not identify Data Race in Result Cache (result_cache_; cache_mutex_).
Run 2 did not identify TOCTOU in Config Loading (std::filesystem::exists; sleep_for).
Run 2 did not identify Integer Division by Zero in Command Routing (100 / static_cast<int>(token_length)).

Corrections.RejectionReason: previous claim is not an exact audited-output quote
